title: A Case For Avoiding High Yielding REITs

title: Blue-Chip Real Estate Is A Bargain - Top Picks Across 5 Sectors
text: Media pundits frequently and sloppily equate office buildings with "commercial real estate," but the two are not equal. There's a lot more to CRE than half-empty downtown office towers. I am staying far, far away from office REITs, even if they seem like deep values right now.

title: I Am Buying These REITs During This Correction
text: There are lots of opportunities following the recent correction. Many REITs are priced at exceptionally low valuations.

title: 5 Reasons to Add Regency Centers (REG) to Your Portfolio Now
text: Amid an improving retail real estate market, Regency Centers (REG) is likely to capitalize on its focus on grocery-anchored shopping centers, strategic expansionary efforts and a solid balance sheet.
